name: Q32 Bio Inc.
business: Q32 Bio Inc. is a clinical stage biotechnology company focused on developing novel biologics to effectively and safely restore healthy immune balance in patients with alopecia areata and other autoimmune and inflammatory diseases. Its most advanced product candidate is bempikibart, a fully human anti-interleukin-7 receptor alpha antagonist monoclonal antibody. The company also owns a tissue-targeted complement inhibitor platform but has sold its Phase 2 asset ADX-097.
sellsTo: patients with autoimmune and inflammatory diseases

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage biotechnology company focused on developing novel biologics to effectively and safely restore healthy immune balance in patients with alopecia areata ( AA ) and other autoimmune and inflammatory diseases driven by pathological immune dysfunction.

catalysts.event: Report 36-week topline data from SIGNAL-AA Part B trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report 36-week topline data from the SIGNAL-AA Part B trial in mid-2026.
